notes: Core shooting and enemy movement work but the game has significant issues: enemies snap to grid rather than flying in formation, the bonus stage logic is broken (enemies never properly spawn/clear), dual-ship/tractor beam mechanics are incomplete, and the small enemy grid (4 columns only) looks nothing like authentic Galaga.
An incredibly impressive implementation that even includes the boss tractor beam and dual-fighter rescue mechanic, bonus stages, and grid lunging.

Playable but heavily simplified and inaccurate versus real Galaga, with missing/rough mechanics like tiny formations, snap-back dives, crude capture/dual-ship logic, and only partial authenticity despite no obvious fatal JS errors.
